hand_dumps.reason: Uses a VCD event variable to cover event-signal handling that ordinary HDL-backed dumps do not preserve portably.
Uses VCD real-value records for property output formatting.
Combines a VCD event variable with a scope named like the event's triggered suffix.
Contains multiple value changes for the same signal at one timestamp to cover VCD event-order semantics.
Uses explicit VCD scope kinds for module, function, and task metadata.
Declares a signal whose first value appears after time zero to cover missing-initial-value behavior.
Uses VCD real-value records for value formatting and FSDB unsupported-real coverage.
